metadata.title: OpenEOS — The modern POS for clubs & events
metadata.description: Flexible, mobile, open source. From the village festival to large-scale events — one system for ordering, kitchen, checkout and analytics.

hero.sub: Flexible, mobile, open source. From the village festival to large-scale events — one system for planning, ordering, kitchen, checkout and analytics.

features.sub: One system that covers every requirement of your event.

mobile.title: Mobile POS
mobile.copy: Run it on phone or tablet — anywhere on the venue.

qrOrder.title: Self-order (QR)
qrOrder.copy: Guests order via QR themselves — less waiting, more revenue.

kitchen.title: Kitchen display
kitchen.copy: Real-time view for kitchen & pickup — no more lost tickets.

payment.title: Card payments
payment.copy: SumUp integration for card payments — fast and secure.

printer.title: Receipt printing
printer.copy: Auto print via Raspberry Pi — affordable hardware.

shifts.title: Shift planning
shifts.copy: Plan and assign shifts — volunteers sign up online.

stats.title: Analytics
stats.copy: Real-time reports and dashboards — always in the loop.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.copy: AGPLv3 license, self-host — full control over your data.

planning.label: Planning
planning.title: Plan your event end-to-end.
planning.copy: Create events, manage members & roles, plan shifts — all in one dashboard.
checks: QR codes per table or location

pos.label: Mobile POS
pos.title: Ring up where the guest is.
pos.copy: Tablet or phone — anywhere on site. Categories, modifiers, split-payment. Receipt printing via Raspberry Pi or network printer.
checks: Z-report & CSV export in one click

order.label: Self-order (QR)
order.title: Scan. Order. Pick up.
order.copy: Guests order at the table or in line themselves. Less waiting, more revenue — and your bar has breathing room.
checks: Payment via SumUp (incl. Apple Pay & Google Pay)

kds.label: Kitchen Display
kds.title: No more lost tickets.
kds.copy: Real-time display for kitchen and pickup. Color-coded timers per ticket, routing per station, mark items ready or delivered.
checks: WebSocket real-time sync across all displays

stats.label: Analytics
stats.title: Know what's happening in 5 minutes.
stats.copy: Live revenue, best sellers, hourly reports, stock movements. Export as CSV or JSON.

sumup.title: SumUp card payments
sumup.copy: SumUp terminal on site and SumUp API online — contactless, Apple Pay, Google Pay.

shifts.title: Shift planning & sign-up
shifts.copy: Plan shifts, assign volunteers, online sign-up with confirmation.

printer.title: Receipt printing via Pi
printer.copy: Python agent for ESC/POS printers. Network IP, no license zoo, cheap hardware.

realtime.title: Real-time sync
realtime.copy: WebSocket gateway keeps POS, kitchen, pickup and printers in lockstep.

pricing.sub: No setup fee. No minimum term. No hidden costs.

saas.title: SaaS
saas.bonus: 20% starter bonus on your first events

gateway.title: Internet gateway rental
gateway.copy: LTE/5G router with Wi-Fi, LAN ports and unlimited data — internet for your POS anywhere, even where there isn't any.
features: Wi-Fi access point for multiple devices
LAN ports for printers, displays & co.

openSource.body: OpenEOS is released under the AGPLv3 license. Self-host, customize, contribute.

cta.sub: Sign up in minutes. Run your first event right away.

footer.tagline: The modern POS system for clubs, events and festival catering.
footer.productBy: A product by LUXCODE by Lukas Lukic-Spitznagel

liability.title: Liability for content
liability.content: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 para.1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we as a service provider are not obligated to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information or to investigate circumstances that indicate illegal activity.

links.title: Liability for links
links.content: Our offer contains links to external third-party websites, on whose contents we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for these external contents. The respective provider or operator of the pages is always responsible for the contents of the linked pages.

copyright.title: Copyright
copyright.content: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Duplication, processing, distribution and any kind of exploitation outside the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator.

overview.title: 1. Privacy at a glance
overview.content: The following information provides a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data is any data that can be used to identify you personally.

responsible.title: 2. Responsible party
responsible.content:
Lukas [Last name]
[Street Number]
[Postal Code City]
Germany

Email: kontakt@openeos.de

server.title: Server log files
server.content: The provider of the pages automatically collects and stores information in so-called server log files, which your browser automatically transmits to us. These are: browser type and browser version, operating system used, referrer URL, hostname of the accessing computer, time of the server request and IP address. This data is not merged with other data sources.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: This website only uses technically necessary cookies that are required for the operation of the website (e.g. to save your language setting and theme preference). These cookies are set without your consent because they are necessary for the basic functions of the website.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you contact us by email, your information including the contact details you provide there will be stored with us for the purpose of processing the request and in the event of follow-up questions. We do not pass on this data without your consent.

hosting.title: 4. Hosting
hosting.content: This website is hosted by an external service provider (host). The personal data collected on this website is stored on the host's servers. This may include IP addresses, contact requests, meta and communication data, contract data, contact details, names, website accesses and other data generated via a website.

rights.title: 5. Your rights
rights.content:
You always have the right to:
• Receive information about your data stored by us
• Have this data corrected or deleted
• Restrict processing
• Object to processing
• Receive your data in a transferable format
• File a complaint with a supervisory authority

changes.title: 6. Changes
changes.content: We reserve the right to adapt this privacy policy so that it always complies with current legal requirements or to implement changes to our services in the privacy policy. The new privacy policy will then apply to your next visit.

scope.title: 1. Scope
scope.content: These General Terms and Conditions (T&C) apply to all contracts between OpenEOS (hereinafter "Provider") and the customer regarding the use of the OpenEOS Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) platform and related services.

services.title: 2. Description of services
services.content:
The provider offers the customer a web-based POS solution. The services include:
• Access to the OpenEOS platform
• Hosting and maintenance of the infrastructure
• Regular updates and security patches
• Support via email, phone and WhatsApp (with SaaS plans)
• Data backup

registration.title: 3. Registration and conclusion of contract
registration.content: Registration takes place by creating an organization on the platform. Upon completion of registration, a contract is concluded between the customer and the provider. The customer assures that all information provided is correct and complete.

pricing.title: 4. Prices and tariffs
pricing.content:
The prices displayed on the website at the time of booking apply:
• SaaS: €25 per event day
• Starter bonus: 20% discount on the first event days (new customers)
• Hardware rental: €50 per device per day

All prices include statutory value added tax.

payment.title: 5. Payment
payment.content: Billing is based on actual usage and invoiced. Event days are aggregated at the end of the month and invoiced. Payment terms: 14 days net.

obligations.title: 6. Customer obligations
obligations.content:
The customer undertakes to:
• Treat access data confidentially
• Not use the platform abusively
• Not process illegal content
• Comply with applicable data protection regulations
• Ensure the correctness of the data entered

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.content: The provider is liable without limitation for damages resulting from injury to life, body or health as well as for intentionally or grossly negligently caused damages. Otherwise, liability is limited to foreseeable, contract-typical damages. Liability for lost profits, indirect damages or data loss is excluded to the extent permitted by law.

termination.title: 8. Contract term and termination
termination.content: The contract is concluded for an indefinite period. Both parties may terminate the contract at any time with a notice period of 14 days to the end of the month. The right to extraordinary termination for good cause remains unaffected.

changes.title: 9. Changes to the T&C
changes.content: The provider reserves the right to change these T&C. Changes will be communicated to the customer at least 30 days before they take effect. If the customer does not object within 14 days of receipt of the notification, the changed T&C shall be deemed accepted.

jurisdiction.title: 10. Final provisions
jurisdiction.content: The law of the Federal Republic of Germany shall apply to the exclusion of the UN Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods. The place of jurisdiction for all disputes arising from this contract is, to the extent permitted by law, the registered office of the provider. Should individual provisions of these T&C be invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall remain unaffected.
